arts.ttl: Chelsea in Real Madrid battle for €84m Premier League ace
arts.sum: Chelsea and Real Madrid have been informed that Murillo is 'likely to leave' Nottingham Forest in the summer, according to a report. Chelsea and Real Madrid are the European behemoths currently associated with the defender and TEAMtalk claims that'some sources' familiar with the player's situation believe that he is 'likely to leave' Forest in the summer.

arts.ttl: Football España x CNN: Barcelona’s attack slices gap and Real Madrid’s refereeing complaints
arts.sum: After another brilliant weekend of La Liga action, Football España joined CNN World Sport to discuss the aftermath of the Madrid derby, Barcelona’s title and naturally, Real Madrid’s ongoing campaign against the officiating in Spain. Both Atletico Madrid and Real Madrid came out of their 1-1 draw on Saturday night with their title challenge well […] The post Football España x CNN: Barcelona’s attack slices gap and Real Madrid’s refereeing complaints appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr's private response to Man City fans' brutal banner at Champions League clash
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior missed out on the 2024 Ballon d'Or to Manchester City star Rodri, who's currently out injured but will see his team-mates face Real Madrid in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Grealish starts, Ake returns as City make eight changes
arts.sum: CITY XI: Ederson, Akanji, Dias, Ake, Gvardiol, Stones, De Bruyne (C), Bernardo, Savinho, Grealish, Haaland Despite only losing three of their 12 games against them in the competition, City have been eliminated from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages by Real Madrid more often than by any other opponent (3 times).

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Real Madrid: Champions League playoff round, first leg – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from 8pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | And read the latest Football Daily Carlo Ancelotti has picked two midfielders, Fede Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni, in the back four. There are two changes from the Madrid derby on Saturday: Eduardo Camavinga replaces the injured Lucas Vazquez, with Valverde moving into Vazquez’s position at right-back, and Ferland Mendy is preferred to Fran Garcia at left-back. Real Madrid (4-2-1-3) Courtois; Valverde, Tchouameni, Asencio, Mendy; Ceballos, Camavinga; Bellingham; Rodrygo, Mbappe, Vinicius Jr. Substitutes: tbc. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Bayern Munich dealt transfer blow as Premier League defender gives 'green light' to Real Madrid switch
arts.sum: Highly-rated Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen is reportedly keen to join Real Madrid amid interest from Chelsea and Bayern Munich.
